channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: AI and Human Creativity: Why Machines Cannot Replace the Human Touch
item.description: In an excerpt from his book 'Open Intelligence: Education between Art and Artificial', Saikat Majumdar explores the growing anxiety about artificial intelligence and its impact on human creativity. Se...

item.title: Iran Responds to US Peace Proposal Amid Ongoing Gulf Tensions
item.description: Iran has officially sent its response to a US proposal to begin peace talks aimed at ending the ongoing conflict in the Gulf, according to the IRNA news agency. The response was routed through Pakista...

item.title: Prime Minister Albanese defends breaking election promise on property policies
item.description: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has defended the government’s decision to alter its 2025 election promises regarding the capital gains tax discount and negative gearing. Speaking to the ABC, Albanese ...

item.title: Government plans income tax relief for salaried class despite no increase in salaries and pensions
item.description: The federal government is planning to provide some relief to salaried individuals in the upcoming budget through reduced income tax rates, while keeping salaries and pensions unchanged. Finance Minist...

item.title: Model Boarding Secondary School in Balle still closed after nine years despite completion
item.description: The Model Boarding Secondary School, Balle, for Gudu LGA in Sokoto State don dey shut for nine years even though government don finish build am in 2017. The project wey cost about N1 billion suppose h...

item.title: Montreal Canadiens Win Game 3 Against Buffalo Sabres to Lead Playoff Series 2-1
item.description: The Montreal Canadiens secured a decisive 6-2 victory over the Buffalo Sabres in Game 3 of their second-round Eastern Conference playoff series, taking a 2-1 lead. Cole Caufield was a standout perform...

item.title: Trump rejects Iran’s response to peace plan amid ongoing conflict and Strait of Hormuz tensions
item.description: The ongoing conflict between the United States, Israel, and Iran continues to escalate, with former US President Donald Trump rejecting Tehran's response to his peace proposals as 'totally unacceptabl...

item.title: A Look at Humor and Innuendo in Vintage Ads, Comics, and Catalogs
item.description: Vintage advertisements, comic books, greeting cards, and mail-order catalogs often contained humor and visual elements that, while acceptable at the time, now appear surprisingly suggestive. Mid-20th-...

item.title: Ugandan Accountant Faces Charges for Alleged Theft from Nick Cannon
item.description: A Ugandan accountant, Frank Musoke, is facing serious allegations for allegedly embezzling over KSh 257 million (approximately $2 million) from American actor and musician Nick Cannon while working at...

item.title: Sammy Ngotho Wins DCP Nomination Ahead of Ol Kalou By-Election
item.description: Nyandarua County’s Ol Kalou parliamentary seat is heating up as Sammy Kamau Ngotho has officially won the Democracy for the Citizens Party (DCP) ticket for the by-election scheduled on July 16, 2026. ...

item.title: Iran Details Demands to End War With U.S. but Leaves Nuclear Guarantees Unresolved
item.description: Iran has formally submitted a detailed multipage reply to the latest U.S. proposal aimed at ending the ongoing war, laying out its own package of demands and underscoring the remaining differences bet...

item.title: British Nationals Evacuated from Hantavirus-Affected Cruise Ship Arrive in Manchester for Quarantine
item.description: On 10th May 2026, a special flight carrying 20 British nationals from the cruise ship MV Hondius, which experienced a hantavirus outbreak, safely landed at Manchester Airport in northwest England. The...

item.title: Cape Town prepares for heavy rain, strong winds, and potential flooding
item.description: Cape Town is preparing for significant disruption as two cold fronts hit the city, bringing heavy rain, strong winds, and freezing temperatures from Sunday into Monday. The South African Weather Servi...

item.title: Motherless Day provides support events for those grieving the loss of a mother
item.description: In Canada, observances called Motherless Day are gaining traction in cities such as Toronto, Vancouver, and Winnipeg. The non-profit Parentless Club created what they describe as 'The Pity Party You’l...

item.title: A Dietitian’s Advice for a Balanced Post-Run Breakfast
item.description: Karima Hazim, a cook and author, shared a detailed account of her meals throughout a typical day, highlighting both her post-run snack and recipe-testing days in the kitchen. After a seven-kilometre j...

item.title: FG seeks private sector support to expand affordable housing
item.description: The Federal Government don show say e wan involve private sector well-well to develop housing sector for Nigeria. Housing Minister, Muttaqha Rabe Darma, talk this one before the second Renewed Hope Ho...

item.title: Daniel Bwala Shares His Experience Joining Tinubu’s Government Despite Past Criticisms
item.description: Daniel Bwala, Special Adviser to President Bola Tinubu on Media and Policy Communication, recently spoke about his initial fears after Tinubu became president. During an interview on Symfoni TV, Bwala...

item.title: Roman Reigns Defends Championship Against Jacob Fatu at WWE Backlash, John Cena Announces New Tournament
item.description: At WWE Backlash 2026, Roman Reigns successfully defended his newly won WWE World Heavyweight Championship by defeating his cousin Jacob Fatu in a headline match at the Benchmark International Arena in...

item.title: Nigeria Customs Returns Stolen Luxury Cars To Canada Following Investigation
item.description: Na serious operation dey go on between Nigeria Customs Service (NCS) and Canadian authorities as dem don recover seven luxury cars wey thieves carry comot from Canada enter Nigeria. The vehicles, wey ...

item.title: Cardoso Confident Sundowns Will Push for Victory Against TS Galaxy
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns coach Miguel Cardoso has reaffirmed that his team will continue to fight for every point until their final league match against TS Galaxy on Tuesday. Sundowns currently lead the PSL ...
